questionText: Voce esta tentando entender como usar um novo aplicativo no seu celular. Como voce pediria ajuda a um amigo?
options: Can you help me understand how to use this app?
You must explain me the app immediately
I am needing your help for the app
Help me to understanding this app
correctAnswer: Can you help me understand how to use this app?

questionText: Seu computador esta com problema e voce precisa descrever o problema a um tecnico. Qual frase e apropriada?
options: My computer is not working properly. It keeps freezing.
My computer has broken and it freezes always
The computer is not good and freezes me
My computer is broken very much
correctAnswer: My computer is not working properly. It keeps freezing.

questionText: Voce quer sugerir a um colega que ele tente uma nova ferramenta online. O que voce diria?
options: You should try this online tool. I think you'll find it useful.
Try this tool because it is good
You must use this tool
This tool is better than yours
correctAnswer: You should try this online tool. I think you'll find it useful.

questionText: Voce precisa pedir ao seu gerente permissao para acessar um documento na nuvem. Como voce faria isto?
options: Could I have access to the cloud document for the project?
I need the document from the cloud now
Give me access to the cloud please
I want to access your cloud document
correctAnswer: Could I have access to the cloud document for the project?

questionText: Um colega lhe manda uma mensagem pedindo para voce enviar um arquivo por email. Como voce confirma recebimento?
options: Got it! I'll send you the file right away.
I have got it and will send
Yes, I got and send the file
I am receiving it and will send
correctAnswer: Got it! I'll send you the file right away.

questionText: Voce esta em uma videoconferencia e nao conseguiu ouvir bem. O que voce diz?
options: Sorry, could you speak up a bit? I didn't catch that.
I don't hear you. Speak more loud
Can you speak louder please?
You are not speaking clear to me
correctAnswer: Sorry, could you speak up a bit? I didn't catch that.

questionText: Voce quer avisar um amigo que encontrou um virus no site que ele recomendou. Como voce faria isto delicadamente?
options: I visited the website you suggested, but I found it has a security issue.
Your website is bad and has virus
The site you said has virus in it
Don't use this site because it is infected
correctAnswer: I visited the website you suggested, but I found it has a security issue.

questionText: Como voce explica a um usuario inexperiente o que e uma senha forte?
options: A strong password should have letters, numbers, and special characters.
Strong password is with many characters only
You need a password that is very difficult
Make your password long and difficult
correctAnswer: A strong password should have letters, numbers, and special characters.

questionText: Voce precisa informar a alguem que a internet esta lenta. Qual frase e mais natural?
options: The internet connection seems to be very slow today.
The internet is slow very much
Internet today is slow
The internet goes slow
correctAnswer: The internet connection seems to be very slow today.

questionText: Como voce pede a alguem para enviar um arquivo novamente porque nao recebeu?
options: Could you resend the file? I didn't receive it.
Send me again the file because I don't have
The file didn't come to me
You must send the file again
correctAnswer: Could you resend the file? I didn't receive it.

questionText: Voce esta criando uma conta em um site e precisa confirmar seus dados. O que voce faria?
options: Is this information correct before I submit?
This information is correct, yes
My data is right, I am submitting
Can my information be submitted?
correctAnswer: Is this information correct before I submit?

questionText: Como voce expressa interesse em aprender mais sobre um software novo?
options: I'd like to learn more about this software. Could you show me?
This software is interesting to me learn
I want learning this software please
Show me this software for learning
correctAnswer: I'd like to learn more about this software. Could you show me?

questionText: Voce esta pedindo a um tecnico para resolver um problema de conectividade. Como voce expressaria isto?
options: Could you help me troubleshoot my internet connection?
My internet is broken, fix it
Help me with my internet please fix
I am having internet problem, can you fix
correctAnswer: Could you help me troubleshoot my internet connection?

questionText: Como voce confirmaria com alguem que entendeu as instrucoes de um aplicativo?
options: I understand. I'll follow these steps.
I am understanding and will following
Yes, I understand and follow them
I get it and will do this
correctAnswer: I understand. I'll follow these steps.

questionText: Voce quer sugerir a um amigo que ele atualize seu software. Como voce diria isto?
options: I think you should update your software. There might be security improvements.
Your software needs to be update
Update your software now
You must update because it is old
correctAnswer: I think you should update your software. There might be security improvements.

questionText: Como voce informaria a alguem que perdeu acesso a sua conta?
options: I've lost access to my account and need to reset my password.
My account is lost from me
I don't have more access to my account
My account is gone and I need it back
correctAnswer: I've lost access to my account and need to reset my password.

questionText: Voce esta participando de uma teleconferencia e precisa alertar que sua bateria esta acabando. Como voce avisa?
options: Sorry, my battery is running out. I might need to leave soon.
My battery is low and I will go
My phone battery is finishing
I am leaving because battery is empty
correctAnswer: Sorry, my battery is running out. I might need to leave soon.

questionText: Como voce pediria a um colega para compartilhar a senha de forma segura com voce?
options: Could you share the password with me securely? Maybe through an encrypted message?
Give me your password in a message
Send me the password please
I need your password for the account
correctAnswer: Could you share the password with me securely? Maybe through an encrypted message?

questionText: Voce esta explicando a alguem como fazer backup de dados. Como voce iniciaria a explicacao?
options: Let me explain how to backup your data. First, you should connect an external hard drive.
You backup your data by drive
For backup you need connecting a drive
Backup data is doing with a drive
correctAnswer: Let me explain how to backup your data. First, you should connect an external hard drive.

questionText: Como voce expressaria frustracao por um aplicativo que travou?
options: This app keeps crashing. It's really frustrating.
The app is crashing and I am frustrated
This app crashes me very much
I am frustrated because the app crashes always
correctAnswer: This app keeps crashing. It's really frustrating.

questionText: Voce precisa relatar um problema de seguranca em um site. Como voce entraria em contato?
options: I'd like to report a security vulnerability on your website. Who should I contact?
Your website has security problem
Your site is not secure
I found a bad security in your website
correctAnswer: I'd like to report a security vulnerability on your website. Who should I contact?

questionText: Como voce sugeriria a alguem que use autenticacao de dois fatores?
options: I recommend enabling two-factor authentication for better security.
You should use two-factor because is better
Enable two-factor for your account
Two-factor authentication makes your account safe
correctAnswer: I recommend enabling two-factor authentication for better security.

questionText: Voce esta em uma chamada de video e precisa informar que sua camera nao esta funcionando. O que voce diria?
options: My camera doesn't seem to be working. Can you still hear me?
My camera is broken and you cannot see me
The camera is not working in my computer
I have no camera for you to see me
correctAnswer: My camera doesn't seem to be working. Can you still hear me?

questionText: Como voce pediria a um usuario para verificar se ele tem a versao mais recente do software?
options: Could you check if you have the latest version of the software installed?
Check your software is the newest
Your software must be updated
You need the latest software version
correctAnswer: Could you check if you have the latest version of the software installed?

questionText: Voce precisa informar a alguem que nao consegue acessar um link. Como voce faria?
options: I've tried clicking the link, but it's not working for me.
The link doesn't work in my computer
This link is broken
I cannot open this link
correctAnswer: I've tried clicking the link, but it's not working for me.

questionText: Como voce expressaria que prefere se comunicar por email em vez de mensagem instantanea?
options: I prefer to communicate via email rather than instant messages for this.
I like email more than messages
Send me email, not messages
Email is better than instant messages
correctAnswer: I prefer to communicate via email rather than instant messages for this.

questionText: Voce esta pedindo ajuda para recuperar um arquivo deletado acidentalmente. Como voce faria?
options: I accidentally deleted an important file. Is there any way to recover it?
I delete important file by mistake
My file was deleted and I need it
Can you give me back my deleted file?
correctAnswer: I accidentally deleted an important file. Is there any way to recover it?

questionText: Como voce sumarizaria o que aprendeu depois de assistir a um tutorial online?
options: I've watched the tutorial and now I understand the basic steps.
I watch the tutorial and know the steps
The tutorial teaches me how to doing it
I watched and I am understanding the tutorial
correctAnswer: I've watched the tutorial and now I understand the basic steps.

questionText: Voce precisa avisar que sera necessario fazer backup antes de instalar uma atualizacao. Como voce faria?
options: Before installing the update, you should create a backup of your files.
Make backup before you update
You need backup before updating
Backup is necessary for updating
correctAnswer: Before installing the update, you should create a backup of your files.

questionText: Como voce pediria permissao para usar um software especifico da empresa?
options: Do I need special permission to use this company software?
Can I use this software of company?
I want to use the company software
May I using the company software?
correctAnswer: Do I need special permission to use this company software?

questionText: Voce esta explicando a razao pela qual alguem nao consegue fazer login. Como voce faria?
options: It looks like your username or password might be incorrect. Have you tried resetting it?
Your username or password is wrong
You cannot login because password is bad
Your credentials is not good for login
correctAnswer: It looks like your username or password might be incorrect. Have you tried resetting it?

questionText: Como voce explicaria a importancia de usar uma VPN em redes publicas?
options: Using a VPN on public networks helps protect your personal data from being intercepted.
VPN is good for public network safety
You must use VPN in public networks
VPN makes your network more secure
correctAnswer: Using a VPN on public networks helps protect your personal data from being intercepted.

questionText: Voce esta orientando alguem sobre como identificar um email de phishing. Como voce faria?
options: Be careful of emails asking you to click links or provide personal information unexpectedly.
Phishing emails are asking your information
Don't click links in suspicious emails
Email phishing is dangerous for you
correctAnswer: Be careful of emails asking you to click links or provide personal information unexpectedly.

questionText: Como voce explicaria a diferenca entre sincronizacao na nuvem e armazenamento local?
options: Cloud sync automatically updates your files across devices, while local storage keeps them on one device.
Cloud sync is for computers and local storage is for phones
Sync makes your files go everywhere
Cloud storage is better than local storage
correctAnswer: Cloud sync automatically updates your files across devices, while local storage keeps them on one device.

questionText: Voce esta descrevendo um erro tecnico complexo a um suporte. Como voce estruturaria sua mensagem?
options: When I try to open the file, the system shows an error code 404. I've restarted the application but the problem persists.
The error 404 is showing and I don't know
My system has error code 404 when opening file
The file has error and I restart but nothing
correctAnswer: When I try to open the file, the system shows an error code 404. I've restarted the application but the problem persists.

questionText: Como voce explicaria a razao pela qual precisar limpar o cache do navegador?
options: Clearing your browser cache can improve performance and resolve loading issues.
Cache needs cleaning for the browser
Your browser cache makes it slow
Delete cache to make browser faster
correctAnswer: Clearing your browser cache can improve performance and resolve loading issues.

questionText: Voce esta aconselhando alguem sobre gestao de senhas. Como voce faria?
options: Consider using a password manager to generate and store strong passwords securely.
Password manager helps to remember your passwords
Use password manager for strong passwords
Password managers are better than writing passwords
correctAnswer: Consider using a password manager to generate and store strong passwords securely.

questionText: Como voce expressaria preocupacao sobre coleta de dados por um aplicativo?
options: I'm concerned about how much personal data this app is collecting. What are the privacy settings?
This app collects my data and I don't like
The app takes my information
This application is collecting data from me
correctAnswer: I'm concerned about how much personal data this app is collecting. What are the privacy settings?

questionText: Voce esta explicando como usar ferramentas de colaboracao online para um projeto. Como comecaria?
options: We can use this online platform to collaborate on the project. Everyone can edit in real-time.
This platform is for collaboration and editing
We all can edit the files together
Use this platform for working together
correctAnswer: We can use this online platform to collaborate on the project. Everyone can edit in real-time.

questionText: Como voce alertaria alguem sobre um possivel malware no seu computador?
options: Your computer might have a malware infection. I recommend running an antivirus scan immediately.
Your computer has malware in it
You need to scan for malware
Malware is in your computer
correctAnswer: Your computer might have a malware infection. I recommend running an antivirus scan immediately.

questionText: Voce esta explicando a importancia de atualizar o sistema operacional. Como voce faria?
options: Operating system updates often include security patches and bug fixes that protect your device.
You should update your system because is important
System updates make your computer secure
Updating the OS is necessary for you
correctAnswer: Operating system updates often include security patches and bug fixes that protect your device.

questionText: Como voce pediria a alguem para compartilhar acesso a um documento sem transferir propriedade?
options: Could you give me view-only access to this document so I can review it?
Share me the document but don't change owner
Give me the document for reading
I want access to your document
correctAnswer: Could you give me view-only access to this document so I can review it?

questionText: Voce esta explicando a diferenca entre armazenamento em nuvem gratuito e pago. Como voce faria?
options: Free cloud storage has limited space and features, while paid plans offer more storage and advanced options.
Free cloud storage is small and paid is big
Paid cloud storage is better than free
You get more space with paid plans
correctAnswer: Free cloud storage has limited space and features, while paid plans offer more storage and advanced options.

questionText: Como voce expressaria frustracao com a qualidade da conexao de internet durante uma videoconferencia?
options: The connection seems unstable right now. Would you mind if I reconnect?
My internet is very bad and unstable
The connection is not good for video call
I have bad internet connection
correctAnswer: The connection seems unstable right now. Would you mind if I reconnect?

questionText: Voce esta oferecendo ajuda para configurar um novo dispositivo. Como voce faria?
options: I can help you set up your new device. Let me walk you through the initial setup process.
I help you configure your device
Your device needs setup and I help
Let me help setting up the new device
correctAnswer: I can help you set up your new device. Let me walk you through the initial setup process.

questionText: Como voce explicaria por que e importante manter copias de seguranca regulares?
options: Regular backups ensure that if something happens to your device, you won't lose your important files.
Backups are important because you might lose files
You should backup your files regularly
Making backups prevents data loss
correctAnswer: Regular backups ensure that if something happens to your device, you won't lose your important files.

questionText: Como voce explicaria a diferenca entre software gratuito e pago ao comparar opcoes?
options: Free software is available at no cost but may have limited features, while paid software typically offers more features and support.
Paid software is always better than free
Free software has all the same features as paid
You should never use free software
correctAnswer: Free software is available at no cost but may have limited features, while paid software typically offers more features and support.

questionText: Como voce descreveria um problema de compatibilidade entre programas?
options: This software isn't compatible with my system version. Do you have an updated version?
The software doesn't work with my computer
My computer is not good for this software
The software is broken
correctAnswer: This software isn't compatible with my system version. Do you have an updated version?

questionText: Como voce pediria a alguem para otimizar seu computador para melhor desempenho?
options: Your computer might run faster if you uninstall unused programs and delete temporary files.
You need a new computer
Delete all your files to make it faster
Your computer is too old to optimize
correctAnswer: Your computer might run faster if you uninstall unused programs and delete temporary files.

questionText: Como voce expressaria a necessidade de aprender a usar uma nova plataforma?
options: I need some training on how to use this platform. Could you provide some guidance?
I don't understand this platform
This platform is too difficult
I want to learn the platform
correctAnswer: I need some training on how to use this platform. Could you provide some guidance?
